title: geranium atlanticum var. maurum
intro: Geranium atlanticum var. maurum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a subspecies of the Geranium atlanticum plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and promoting a good night's sleep. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
